executive_summary.brutal_truth: 75% of tested commands violate your own simplicity rules

evidence.roi_calculation: Negative - more time spent on process than outcome
evidence.comparison_to_manual: Manual thinking is 10x faster and equally effective

savage_analysis.complexity_calculation_irony: Spends more time calculating complexity than implementing
savage_analysis.delegation_inception: Command that delegates to other commands that delegate

evidence.effectiveness: Better than ultrathink but still poor execution rate

java-rapid-implementation.md.recommendation: MAJOR REFACTOR - Cut 60% of process bloat

adhd-morning-assistant.md.verdict: SURPRISINGLY COMPETENT - ACTUALLY SOLVES REAL PROBLEMS

positive_analysis.addresses_real_need: ADHD time management is genuine problem
positive_analysis.data_driven_approach: Uses historical patterns, not generic advice
positive_analysis.personalization: Adapts to individual patterns over time

evidence.integration_quality: Smart use of Basic Memory for learning

adhd-morning-assistant.md.recommendation: KEEP AND PROMOTE AS BEST PRACTICE EXAMPLE

mixed_analysis.good: Smart tool orchestration, structured output format
mixed_analysis.ugly: Thinking about thinking about architecture analysis

evidence.tool_strategy: Excellent use of Glob/Grep/Read native tools
evidence.bloat_problem: Too much meta-cognition, not enough action
evidence.variance_explanation: Performance depends heavily on project complexity

analyze-project-architecture.md.recommendation: REFACTOR - Cut thinking bloat by 40%, keep tool orchestration

correlation_analysis.interpretation: More thinking correlates with less value

system_wide_problems: THINKING BLOAT EPIDEMIC: Commands spend more time thinking than doing
COMPLEXITY RULE IGNORED: 75% violation rate of your own simplicity standards
ACADEMIC BIAS: Over-engineering disguised as thoroughness
USER HOSTILE: High cognitive load, low practical value
failure_pattern: Metacognitive recursion creates infinite loops of analysis
Complexity calculations take longer than actual work

immediate_actions: KILL ultrathink.md - Zero value, maximum bloat
PROMOTE adhd-morning-assistant.md as best practice template
system_improvements: Enforce complexity score < 5 rule with automated checks
Limit thinking blocks to maximum 20% of command content
Ban metacognitive recursion (thinking about thinking about thinking)
Require measurable outcomes for every command

final_verdict.most_disappointing: ultrathink.md - Academic masturbation masquerading as utility
final_verdict.ray_of_hope: adhd-morning-assistant.md - Proves you CAN build useful commands
final_verdict.prognosis: CRITICAL - System needs immediate simplification surgery
